final:
// // This module implements a 2-bit shift register with parallel load capability. The shift register has a clock input (clk), a reset input (rst), a load input (load), a 2-bit input data (data_in), and a 2-bit output (data_out). When the load signal is high, the contents of data_in should be loaded into the shift register. On each rising edge of the clock, if the load signal is low, the contents of the shift register should shift right by one position, and the most significant bit (MSB) should be filled with 1.
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input load,
    input [1:0] data_in,
    output reg [1:0] data_out
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            data_out <= 2'b00;
        end else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end else begin
            data_out <= {data_out[0], 1'b0}; // Shift left and fill LSB with 0
        end
    end
endmodule
